purpose: Fix the standard real basis of the sigma-odd lower-root trace bundle at mu = -1/2 and identify it canonically with the R^{2N} coordinates used elsewhere in Phase 3.

per_component.Phi_minus_half_R^(i): rho^(-1/2) cos(varphi/2) in the alpha_1 direction on collar U_i
per_component.Phi_minus_half_I^(i): rho^(-1/2) sin(varphi/2) in the alpha_1 direction on collar U_i

dictionary.e_i^R: constant coefficient of the upper-root model psi_i^R = rho^(3/2) cos(varphi/2)
dictionary.e_i^I: constant coefficient of the upper-root model psi_i^I = rho^(3/2) sin(varphi/2)

model_identity.consequence: In the model normalization, one unit of upper-root coefficient in e_i^R or e_i^I produces two units in the corresponding lower-root basis coefficient.

normalization_rule_for_kappa_src.rule: kappa_src^(i) must be recorded in the lower-root basis {Phi_minus_half_R^(i), Phi_minus_half_I^(i)} fixed here, not in any alternative complex or cover-normalized basis.
normalization_rule_for_kappa_src.if_complex_notation_is_used: convert e^{± i varphi/2} coefficients to the real cosine/sine basis before serializing.
